purpose: Materialize the projected Node facade for Lane Workers as a thin resolver doorway.

requiredOperations.purpose: Resolve the projection manifest and executable SEJ before materialization.
Write the projected Node facade exactly as declared.
Compute the materialized facade hash from disk.
Emit node projection receipt for the materialized facade.

receiptShape.completionPosture: Lane Workers facade is a generated thin resolver doorway and owns no product truth.

completionPosture: Lane Workers Node facade is materialized only when the resolver writes generated/workers/node/lane-worker.cjs and emits evidence/workers/lane-worker.node-projection.receipt.v1.json.
